title: Daily Planner Template
scenario: Create a daily planner template that includes spaces for tasks, appointments, and notes. The template should be formatted for standard daily planners.
constraints: Must use standard daily planner formatting

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated markdown adheres to the constraints.
Check if the generated markdown is correctly formatted for a daily planner.
Check if the template includes spaces for tasks, appointments, and notes.
